1.1.1.name: Non-text Content
1.1.1.description: All non-text content has text alternatives

1.3.1.name: Info and Relationships
1.3.1.description: Information and relationships are programmatically determinable

1.4.3.name: Contrast (Minimum)
1.4.3.description: Text has contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1

1.4.10.name: Reflow
1.4.10.description: Content can be presented without horizontal scrolling at 320px width

2.1.1.name: Keyboard
2.1.1.description: All functionality is available from keyboard

2.4.1.name: Bypass Blocks
2.4.1.description: Skip links or other bypass mechanisms are available

2.4.6.name: Headings and Labels
2.4.6.description: Headings and labels describe topic or purpose

4.1.2.name: Name, Role, Value
4.1.2.description: UI components have accessible names and roles
